device: replace with output device, such as USB-C EarPods, laptop speakers, wired DAC, or headphones
route: Axiom JamesDSP Controller, same capture/output route for both scripts

material.label: bass-light piano, vocal, or acoustic item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.comparison_target: width-profile Labs fixture versus width-plus-bass-saturation Labs fixture
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for whether the bass saturation changes center stability, low-mid clarity, or tonal naturalness on sparse material.

material.label: electronic or modern pop item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.comparison_target: width-profile Labs fixture versus width-plus-bass-saturation Labs fixture
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for bass smoothness, weight, kick cleanliness, pumping, and whether the track loses aliveness.

material.label: hip-hop, trap-sub, or kick-forward item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.comparison_target: width-profile Labs fixture versus width-plus-bass-saturation Labs fixture
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for kick impact, bass anchoring, bass-image coupling, fuzz, level retreat, and fatigue.

material.label: upright bass, bass guitar, or sustained low-frequency item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.comparison_target: width-profile Labs fixture versus width-plus-bass-saturation Labs fixture
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for bass texture, note definition, smear, dullness, and whether added weight remains controlled.

observations.bass: replace with whether bass becomes smoother, heavier, clearer, smeared, bloated, or unchanged
observations.punch: replace with whether kick/snare/transient focus improves, stays the same, or weakens
observations.center_image: replace with whether centered vocal, kick, snare, or piano remains anchored
observations.lateral_spread: replace with whether width remains similar to the width fixture or changes unexpectedly
observations.localization_blur: replace with whether source positions are clearer, unchanged, or more smeared
observations.depth_impression: replace with whether depth feels preserved, flatter, deeper, or unstable
observations.bass_image_coupling: replace with whether bass weight stays attached to kick/center/main image
observations.width: replace with whether the bass fixture changes perceived stereo size relative to the width fixture
observations.air: replace with whether high-frequency air stays open or becomes dull/shimmery
observations.harshness: replace with whether either fixture makes bright material sharper or smoother
observations.loudness: replace with whether one fixture feels louder after fair level handling
observations.fatigue: replace with whether repeated listening is easier on the width fixture or bass fixture
observations.route_context: replace with output device, crossfeed state, Windows source endpoint, and processed output endpoint
observations.artifacts: replace with any pumping, crackle, image movement, dullness, fuzz, smear, or none heard
observations.overall: replace with keep, reject, material dependent, no reliable difference, or needs retest
